findings.description: Three complete source sections are absent from the knowledge file: 'コード値の取得方法' (other_example_code_get), 'コード値を使ったバリデーション' (other_example_code_validate), and '警告メッセージの表示方法' (other_example_warn_message). These sections are listed in the source's table of contents and referenced in s1's index hints ('コード値取得', 'コード値バリデーション', '警告メッセージ'), but no corresponding sections (s8, s9, s10) with actual content exist in the knowledge file. The source file is truncated in the provided excerpt at the start of other_example_code_get, confirming the heading exists; the automated pre-check flagging 'section count 7 < source headings 15' is consistent with these three sections being missing.
findings.source_evidence: Source ToC lists: other_example_code_get, other_example_code_validate, other_example_warn_message. Source file ends mid-document at the `other_example_code_get` heading (line starting `--------`). Knowledge file index s1 references 'コード値取得', 'コード値バリデーション', '警告メッセージ' but no sections s8/s9/s10 exist.
